messages.content: 以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：正常叶片的中部叶高区域激波后分离涡强度最大，流场结构也最为复杂，相应的流场气动敏感性也更强，所以发生在叶片前缘中部的缺口损伤对其存在的叶高范围流场结构会产生极大的影响。

The region of maximum separation vortex intensity and the most complex flow field structure occur after the shock wave on the mid-blade region of a normal blade. This also leads to a stronger aerodynamic sensitivity of the flow field. Therefore, the occurrence of notch damage in the middle of the leading edge of the blade will have a significant impact on the flow field structure of the corresponding high-pressure region.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：正常叶片的中部叶高区域激波后分离涡强度最大，并且流场结构也最为复杂，所以中部叶高区域的流场气动敏感性也更强。

After the shock wave, the mid-blade region of a normal blade exhibits the highest intensity of separation vortex, and the flow field structure is also the most complex. Consequently, the aerodynamic sensitivity of the flow field in the mid-blade region is stronger.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：为研究叶片前缘中部发生缺口使压气机稳定裕度大幅降低的原因，图25给出了近失速流量下NMLE叶片和正常叶片三维流线图。结合图16(c)，图 21(a)、(c)来看，正常叶片的中部叶高区域激波后分离涡强度最大，并且流场结构也最为复杂，导致中部叶高区域的流场气动敏感性也更强，所以发生在叶片前缘中部的缺口损伤对其存在的叶高范围流场结构会产生极大的影响。

To investigate the reasons for a significant reduction in the stability margin of a compressor when a notch occurs in the middle of the leading edge, Figure 25 provides three-dimensional streamlines for NMLE (Near Maximum Lift Edge) blade and normal blade under near stall flow conditions. Combining with Figure 16(c), Figure 21(a), and Figure 21(c), it can be observed that the mid-blade region of a normal blade exhibits the maximum intensity of separation vortex after the shock wave, and the flow field structure is also the most complex. This leads to a stronger aerodynamic sensitivity of the flow field in the mid-blade region. Therefore, a notch damage occurring in the middle of the leading edge of the blade will have a significant impact on the flow field structure in the corresponding high-pressure region.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我润色下面这段文字：It is observed that the blunt structure formed by the notch occurring in the middle blade height region will cause the incoming gas to migrate towards the blade tip and blade root directions. This flow phenomenon will increase the adverse pressure gradient on the suction surface of the blade in the middle blade height range, which will aggravate the backflow phenomenon on the suction surface of the blade. A large amount of backflow gas will strongly mix with the low-energy fluid in the boundary layer separation region of the blade suction surface.

It is observed that the presence of a notch in the mid-blade height region results in the formation of a blunt structure. This blunt structure causes the gas to divert towards both the blade tip and root directions. Consequently, an adverse pressure gradient is induced on the suction surface of the blade in the mid-blade height range. This gradient exacerbates the backflow phenomenon, with a significant amount of backflow gas mixing vigorously with the low-energy fluid in the boundary layer separation region on the suction surface of the blade.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：通过观察发现，发生在中部叶高区域的缺口形成的钝头结构会使来流气体向叶顶方向和叶根方向迁移，这种流动现象会加大中部叶高叶片吸力面的逆压梯度，使叶片吸力面的回流现象加重，大量的回流气体与叶片吸力面附面层分离区低能流体发生强掺混作用。

Through observation, it is found that a blunt head structure is formed when a notch occurs in the mid-blade height region. This blunt head structure causes the incoming gas to migrate towards the blade tip and root directions. This flow phenomenon increases the adverse pressure gradient on the suction surface of the blade in the mid-blade height region, resulting in an exacerbation of the backflow phenomenon on the suction surface of the blade. As a result, a large amount of backflow gas strongly mixes with the low-energy fluid in the boundary layer separation region of the blade suction surface.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：通过观察发现，当中部叶高区域出现缺口时，中部叶高区域就会形成的钝头前缘结构，这种钝头前缘结构会使来流气体向叶顶方向和叶根方向迁移，这种流动现象会加大中部叶高叶片吸力面的逆压梯度，使叶片吸力面的回流现象加重，大量的回流气体与叶片吸力面附面层分离区的低能流体发生强掺混作用，在中部叶高区域的吸力面附面层分离区产生回流涡结构。

Through observation, it is found that when a notch occurs in the mid-blade height region, a blunt leading edge structure is formed in this region. This blunt leading edge structure causes the incoming gas to migrate towards both the blade tip and root directions. This flow phenomenon amplifies the adverse pressure gradient on the suction surface of the blade in the mid-blade height region and exacerbates the backflow phenomenon on the suction surface of the blade. A significant amount of backflow gas strongly mixes with the low-energy fluid in the boundary layer separation region on the suction surface of the blade, leading to a strong mixing effect. Additionally, a recirculation vortex structure is formed in the boundary layer separation region on the suction surface in the mid-blade height region.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：通过观察发现，当中部叶高区域出现缺口时，中部叶高区域就会形成的钝头前缘结构，这种钝头前缘结构会使来流气体向叶顶方向和叶根方向迁移，这种流动现象会加大中部叶高叶片吸力面的逆压梯度，使叶片吸力面的回流现象加重，大量的回流气体与叶片吸力面附面层分离区的低能流体发生强掺混作用，导致在中部叶高区域的吸力面附面层分离区产生回流涡结构。

Through observation, it has been found that when a notch occurs in the mid-blade height region, it leads to the formation of a blunt leading edge structure in this region. This blunt leading edge structure causes the incoming gas to migrate towards both the blade tip and root directions. Consequently, this flow phenomenon increases the adverse pressure gradient on the suction surface of the mid-blade height region, thereby exacerbating the backflow phenomenon on the suction surface of the blade. A significant volume of backflow gas strongly interacts and mixes with the low-energy fluid in the boundary layer separation region of the suction surface of the blade, resulting in the formation of a recirculation vortex structure in the boundary layer separation region of the mid-blade height region.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：如图 25 所示，相较于正常叶片，NMLE 叶片在中部叶片高度范围大约叶片的50%弦长的位置，由于气体流向的改变和附面层提前分离和叶片吸力面大量回流气体以及中部叶高强径向涡的相互作用，原来的径向涡会向叶片弦向大范围扩展，形成严重的弦向回流分离涡结构，叶片中部的50%弦长位置径向涡会出现明显的涡核结构。扩展的分离涡会沿叶片弦向由原来70%弦长位置一直发展到叶片出口位置，并且在近失速点的强离心力的作用下，弦向分离涡在靠近出口的位置会向叶顶抬升，导致 50%-70%叶高范围发生严重堵塞，使该叶高范围出口流量急剧减小，增大压气机的尾迹损失，压气机的气动性能因此受到巨大影响，诱发压气机的失速。此外，NMLE叶片的弦向扩展分离涡造成的压气机出口堵塞程度要大于NTLE叶片和NRLE叶片

As shown in Figure 25, compared to a normal blade, the NMLE (Near Maximum Lift Edge) blade exhibits significant changes in the gas flow direction and premature boundary layer separation in the middle blade height region, resulting in a substantial backflow of gas on the suction surface of the blade and the interaction with the strong radial vortices in the mid-blade height. Consequently, the original radial vortices will expand extensively in the chordwise direction, forming severe chordwise backflow separation vortex structures, with noticeable vortex core structures at approximately 50% chord length position. The extended separation vortices will extend along the chordwise direction from the original 70% chord length position to the blade outlet position. Under the strong centrifugal force near the stall point, the chordwise separation vortices will lift towards the blade tip near the outlet, resulting in severe blockage in the 50%-70% blade height range. This leads to a drastic reduction in the outlet flow rate in this blade height range, increasing the wake loss of the compressor and significantly impacting the aerodynamic performance, potentially inducing compressor stall. Furthermore, the degree of compressor outlet blockage caused by the chordwise extended separation vortices of the NMLE blade is greater than that of the NTLE (Near Total Lift Edge) blade and NRLE (Near Rest Lift Edge) blade.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：如图 25 所示，相较于正常叶片，由于中部叶片高度的缺口导致的气体流向的改变和附面层提前分离和叶片吸力面大量回流气体以及中部叶高强径向涡的相互作用，在中部叶片高度范围内NMLE 叶片的50%弦长的位置，原来的径向涡会沿叶片弦向大范围扩展，形成严重的弦向回流分离涡结构，叶片中部的50%弦长位置径向涡会出现明显的涡核结构。扩展的分离涡会沿叶片弦向由原来70%弦长位置一直发展到叶片出口位置，并且在近失速点的强离心力的作用下，弦向分离涡在靠近出口的位置会向叶顶抬升，导致 50%-70%叶高范围发生严重堵塞，使该叶高范围出口流量急剧减小，增大压气机的尾迹损失，压气机的气动性能因此受到巨大影响，诱发压气机的失速。此外，NMLE叶片的弦向扩展分离涡造成的压气机出口堵塞程度要大于NTLE叶片和NRLE叶片

As depicted in Figure 25, compared to a normal blade, the presence of a notch in the middle blade height region leads to changes in the gas flow direction, premature boundary layer separation, and significant backflow of gas on the suction surface of the blade, along with the interaction with the strong radial vortices in the mid-blade height. Specifically, at approximately 50% chord length position in the middle blade height range of the NMLE (Near Maximum Lift Edge) blade, the original radial vortices expand extensively in the chordwise direction, forming severe chordwise backflow separation vortex structures, with distinct vortex core structures at the 50% chord length position of the blade. The extended separation vortices propagate along the chordwise direction from the original 70% chord length position to the blade outlet position. Additionally, under the influence of strong centrifugal forces near the stall point, the chordwise separation vortices lift towards the blade tip near the outlet, causing significant blockage in the 50%-70% blade height range. This leads to a drastic reduction in the outlet flow rate in this blade height range, increasing the wake loss of the compressor, and greatly affecting the aerodynamic performance of the compressor, potentially triggering compressor stall. Moreover, the degree of compressor outlet blockage caused by the chordwise extended separation vortices of the NMLE blade is greater than that of the NTLE (Near Total Lift Edge) blade and NRLE (Near Rest Lift Edge) blade.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：如图 25 所示，相较于正常叶片，由于中部叶片高度的缺口导致的气体流向的改变和附面层提前分离和叶片吸力面大量回流气体以及中部叶高强径向涡的相互作用，会导致位于中部叶片高度范围内NMLE 叶片的50%弦长位置的径向涡沿叶片弦向大范围扩展，形成严重的弦向回流分离涡结构，叶片中部的50%弦长位置径向涡会出现明显的涡核结构。扩展的分离涡会沿叶片弦向由原来70%弦长位置一直发展到叶片出口位置，并且在近失速点的强离心力的作用下，弦向分离涡在靠近出口的位置会向叶顶抬升，导致 50%-70%叶高范围发生严重堵塞，使该叶高范围出口流量急剧减小，增大压气机的尾迹损失，压气机的气动性能因此受到巨大影响，诱发压气机的失速。此外，NMLE叶片的弦向扩展分离涡造成的压气机出口堵塞程度要大于NTLE叶片和NRLE叶片
